collections.name: Starter Kits
collections.description: First cyanotype paper kits, balcony sunprint kits, family nature-walk kits, and workshop-host classroom bundles.

collections.name: Print Surfaces
collections.description: Pre-treated papers, cotton fabric squares, tote blanks, postcard sets, bookmark strips, and archival card stock.

collections.name: Exposure and Rinse Tools
collections.description: Contact frames, acrylic sheets, clips, foam boards, trays, rinse bottles, drying twine, and print-safe gloves.

collections.name: Botanical Collection Goods
collections.description: Pocket plant presses, specimen envelopes, field scissors, labeling tags, wax pencils, and seasonal motif cards.

collections.name: Chemistry and Finishing Supplies
collections.description: Brush-on cyanotype chemistry, measuring cups, foam brushes, toning samples, archival sleeves, and print logbooks.

collections.name: Curated Visual Bundles
collections.description: Fern study sets, coastal drift kits, garden wedding place-card kits, and winter lace-and-shadow print sets.

products.name: First Sun Paper Kit
products.summary: Pre-treated cyanotype paper, acrylic sheet, clips, rinse guide, and a compact log card for first-time printmakers.
products.use_case: Start at home without piecing together chemistry, paper, frames, and drying gear.

products.name: Balcony Sunprint Kit
products.summary: A compact kit for small outdoor spaces with paper, contact sheet, clips, rinse bottle, and drying twine.
products.use_case: Apartment and porch print sessions using leaves, lace, feathers, and found objects.

products.name: Family Nature-Walk Kit
products.summary: Paper sheets, specimen envelopes, label tags, rinse tools, and simple workflow cards for a group outing.
products.use_case: Homeschool families and nature-journal keepers preserving a walk or garden season.

products.name: Workshop-Host Classroom Bundle
products.summary: Bulk paper, trays, rinse bottles, gloves, clips, drying line, and participant log cards for a workshop table.
products.use_case: Hands-on cyanotype sessions with reliable materials for multiple participants.

products.name: Indigo Paper Field Pack
products.summary: Twenty pre-treated sheets sized for leaves, lace fragments, feathers, and postcard-scale compositions.
products.use_case: Quick botanical studies with immediate deep-blue visual payoff.

products.name: Cotton Square Stack
products.summary: Pre-treated cotton fabric squares for soft cyanotype samples, patch studies, and giftable impressions.
products.use_case: Slow-craft artists translating pressed flowers and lace into textile studies.

products.name: Postcard & Bookmark Surface Set
products.summary: Pre-treated postcard sets and bookmark strips for small finished pieces.
products.use_case: Design-aware gifts, garden notes, and quick seasonal print runs.

products.name: Maple Contact Frame
products.summary: A reusable exposure frame with clear acrylic, brass clips, and a foam board back for crisp specimen edges.
products.use_case: Holding leaves, feathers, and lace flat during sun exposure.

products.name: Rinse Tray & Drying Line Set
products.summary: Low-profile tray, rinse bottle, print-safe gloves, clips, and drying twine for the reveal stage.
products.use_case: A tidy rinse-and-dry station for home or workshop tables.

products.name: Pocket Plant Press
products.summary: A walk-ready press with blotter sheets, specimen envelopes, label tags, and a wax pencil for garden notes.
products.use_case: Collecting and flattening botanical subjects before composing prints.

products.name: Brush-On Chemistry Desk Set
products.summary: Measured cyanotype chemistry, cups, foam brushes, gloves, and toning samples for custom paper or fabric.
products.use_case: Artists who want control over surface size, brush edge, and finishing experiments.

products.name: Print Logbook & Archive Sleeves
products.summary: A structured logbook with archival sleeves for tracking exposure date, subject, light, rinse, and finish.
products.use_case: Nature-journal keepers and collectors preserving print series over a season.

products.name: Forest Floor Archive
products.summary: Fern motif cards, indigo paper, labeling tags, archival sleeves, and a print logbook for a wall-ready botanical series.
products.use_case: Creating a cohesive fern study set from collection through archive.

products.name: Tide Line Shadows
products.summary: A coastal drift kit with postcard stock, composition cards, acrylic sheet, clips, rinse bottle, and drying twine.
products.use_case: Turning beach walks and small found objects into compact cyanotype postcards.

products.name: Garden Table Names
products.summary: Archival card stock, wax pencil, botanical motif cards, labeling tags, sleeves, and finishing notes for place cards.
products.use_case: Garden wedding place-card prints with a consistent botanical visual language.

products.name: Winter Lace-and-Shadow Print Set
products.summary: Pre-treated paper, lace composition cards, acrylic sheet, clips, toning samples, and sleeves for crisp winter studies.
products.use_case: Seasonal indoor composition with lace, small found objects, and low-angle winter light.
